title: Complete set of first-order polarization observables in nucleon-deuteron elastic scattering near 20 MeV deuteron energy

x4freetext: Complete set of first-order polarization observables

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Physical Review, Part C, Nuclear Physics, Vol.27, p.1932 (1983)

x4freetext: Target material was hydrogen or deuterium gas in the
small gas cell with a 2.5 mu-m thick Havar window.
particles were detected by four counter telescopes
composed of a thin silicon surface-barrier detector
and a thick one, installed so that there were two on
the left turntable and two on the right turntable.
Particle identifiers were used if it was a need to
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases.
